zh.Barton, Preston, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Boothe of Barton, Esq.於大約1354年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton36歲，母親Elena Ellen de Workesley11352歲。他於1378年與Lady Joanna Trafford在英國藍卡爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1411年在英國被列為member of parliament。他去世於1422年3月在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Boothe of Barton, Esq.于大约1354年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton36岁，母亲Elena Ellen de Workesley11352岁。他于1378年与Lady Joanna Trafford在英国藍卡爾巴頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1411年在英国被列为member of parliament。他去世于1422年3月在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Boothe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Booth
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Boothe of Barton, Esq. was born about 1354, in Barton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, was 36 and his mother, Elena Ellen de Workesley, was 11352. He married Lady Joanna Trafford in 1378, in Barton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1411, at the age of 58, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in England. He died in March 1422, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Boothe of Barton, Esq. est né environ 1354, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elena Ellen de Workesley, avait 11352 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joanna Trafford en 1378, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1411, à l’âge de 58 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Angleterre. Il est décédé en mars 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre.

de.St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesb: St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Boothe of Barton, Esq. um 1354 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton 36 und seine Mutter Elena Ellen de Workesley 11352. Er hat 1378 in Barton, Lancashire, England Lady Joanna Trafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1411, als er 58 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in England aufgeführt. Er starb im März 1422 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Boothe of Barton, Esq. è nato il circa 1354 nel Barton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elena Ellen de Workesley, aveva 11352 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joanna Trafford nel 1378, nel Barton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1411, all'età di 58 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel England. Morì nel marzo 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Boothe of Barton, Esq.が約1354年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Booth Of Bartonは36歳，母Elena Ellen de Workesleyは11352歳であった。1378年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンでLady Joanna Traffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1411年，58歳の時，イギリスでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1422年3月に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesb: 영국 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Boothe of Barton, Esq.(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena Ellen de Workesley(은)는 11352세였다. 그는 1378년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 Lady Joanna Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1411년, 58세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1422년 3월 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Boothe of Barton, Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elena Ellen de Workesley, tinha 11352 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joanna Trafford em 1378, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1411, com 58 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em março de 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesb: ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Boothe of Barton, Esq. родился около 1354 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena Ellen de Workesley, 11352. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joanna Trafford в 1378 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1411 году, в возрасте 58 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности Англия. Он умер марта 1422 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Joanna Trafford en 1378, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1411, a la edad de 58 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Inglaterra. Murió en marzo de 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra.
